chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1482 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 12.12.2023 None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
